newClaims.quote: AdventHealth Digestive Health Institute surgeon Sharona Ross, MD, is the founder and chair of Women in Surgery (WIS), an organization formed to encourage women to choose careers in surgery and to support women currently in the discipline.
newClaims.claimText: DHI hosts the Women in Surgery (WIS) Career Symposium, founded and chaired by Sharona Ross, MD.
newClaims.limitations: Career symposium for women in surgery; not a USCE offering; West Florida DHI scope.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Career symposium for practicing/aspiring surgeons — Tier 3.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 skipped the third labeled section (Women in Surgery Career Symposium) which is a separate career-oriented program.

newClaims.quote: For more information, call 813-615-7030 , or visit Women-In-Surgery.com .

newClaims.limitations: Phone is for WIS Career Symposium, not for USCE/observership inquiries.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Contact for a Tier 3 career symposium.

newClaims.limitations: Faculty-level clinical-trials signal; no student/resident research elective stated.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Faculty-level clinical-trial PI work is Tier 3 practice/career, not Tier 1 student research.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 reused this sentence only for the resident/fellow training signal and skipped the clinical-trials / research-PI clause.

newClaims.limitations: No specific medical school named; faculty-status signal only.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Academic faculty appointments are a Tier 3 practice/career signal.

a1ClaimsToRefine.explanation: Tagged HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL but cleaned text identifies content as AdventHealth DHI West Florida (a regional department), not the corporate system. Suggest DEPARTMENT_LEVEL or CAMPUS_SPECIFIC (West Florida).

CME is offered by DHI specifically, not by the AdventHealth system. Re-scope to DEPARTMENT_LEVEL.
Describes DHI West Florida doctors, not AdventHealth system-wide. Re-scope to DEPARTMENT_LEVEL.
Quote is the page <title> only. A stronger proof would tie the West Florida–vs–Orlando mismatch to body-text references; the title alone may be thin for downstream gating.

additionalUnresolveds: Page mentions 'visit our website' for CME and 'visit our Graduate Medical Education website' for fellowships but does not provide URLs in cleaned text.
Page mentions 'region's medical schools' where DHI doctors hold academic positions but does not name any school (USF is named only in the GI residency context).
Page does not state whether AdventHealth Orlando campus participates in the USF GI residency or the Advanced Colorectal / GI-HPB fellowships.
Page is silent on observership, visiting student, elective, sub-internship, and student research — absence rather than explicit refusal.
recommendedA3Focus: Confirm no PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claim is attached to this source (URL adventhealth.com/medical-education + content scoped to DHI West Florida, no observership/elective content).
Verify A1 source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL is downgraded to DEPARTMENT_LEVEL or CAMPUS_SPECIFIC (West Florida) for the four A1 GME/CME claims.
Verify no claim is attributed to AdventHealth Orlando without a campusApplicabilityProof — the cleaned text never names Orlando.
Confirm absence of observership/visiting-student content is gated as NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY_FOUND, not PUBLIC_SAFE_NO_PUBLIC_OPPORTUNITY (no explicit refusal quote present).
